nasb.text: But when they came to the camp of Israel, the Israelites arose and struck the Moabites, so that they fled before them; and they went forward into the land, slaughtering the Moabites.

esv.text: But when they came to the camp of Israel, the Israelites rose and struck the Moabites, till they fled before them. And they went forward, striking the Moabites as they went.

cnv.text: 他們來到以色列營，以色列人起來，擊殺摩押人，摩押人就在以色列人面前逃跑；以色列人就攻進摩押，擊殺他們。

ccb.text: 他们到了以色列营，以色列人奋起迎战，杀得他们转身逃跑。以色列人乘胜追击，杀入摩押境内，击杀摩押人，
